title: Squirrel Removal in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, attic cleanup & exclusion. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $900-$2,500.
intro: Squirrels invading your Dyker Heights home through attic vents or roof gaps? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout this historic Brooklyn neighborhood, from the tree-lined streets near Dyker Beach Park to the beautiful residential blocks famous for their holiday displays. Our humane removal process includes full inspection, safe extraction, entry point sealing, and damage repair to protect your property year-round.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Dyker Heights homeowners for years with specialized knowledge of the neighborhood's unique architecture, including the area's many Cape Cod and Tudor-style homes where squirrels commonly nest in attics and eaves. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency service throughout Brooklyn and guarantee all exclusion work to prevent re-entry.
localContext: Dyker Heights' mature oak and maple trees along its quiet residential streets create ideal habitats for gray squirrels, which frequently seek shelter in home attics during harsh weather. The neighborhood's well-maintained single-family homes between 7th and 14th Avenues are particularly susceptible to squirrel intrusions through roof soffits and chimney caps, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Dyker Heights typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, attic damage, and necessary exclusion work. This includes inspection, humane trapping, entry point sealing, and cleanup services.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Dyker Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter Dyker Heights homes through roof vents, damaged soffits, gaps in fascia boards, uncapped chimneys, and openings where utilities enter the structure. The neighborhood's mature trees provide easy access to rooflines, making proper exclusion critical for long-term prevention.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal services in Dyker Heights humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal methods for squirrel removal in Dyker Heights. We use live traps and one-way exclusion devices that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, followed by sealing all entry points to prevent future infestations without harming the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Dyker Heights home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Dyker Heights and can typically complete initial inspection and trap setup within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, followed by exclusion work and attic restoration as needed.
